form.formComment: Latest effort finished 5th on April 14 over 400m at Bulli behind Kooringa Express beaten 5.5 lengths (22.91) in a Grade 4/5. Has a strong record from box 1, including two wins. Go close.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Ran a better race when second behind My Wee Lass at The Gardens last start over 400m (22.97). Right in the mix.

form.formComment: Lines up from box 3 for the first time after finishing a 12 length fifth at Temora (19.65) in a Grade 5. Others rate better this time.

form.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage fourth last time out over 340m at Bulli. Doesn't look smart enough to threaten the top few.

form.formComment: Last start finished fourth over 324m at Richmond Straight, beaten 4.5 lengths (17.90) behind Noir in a Grade 5 on April 9. Thereabouts last time others preferred this line-up.

Shortly after the start shifted in abruptly and came together.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished last over 324m at Richmond Straight beaten 5.5 lengths (18.05) behind Noir in a Grade 5 on April 2. Strong form emerging from the that last run. Leading chance.
